title: GBPUAT Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
organization: Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT)
short_info: The latest Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Dean/Director posts! Published under Advt No. A-29/2026 at GBPUAT Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 10 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Doctorate degree in the relevant field along with required teaching/research experience and having a minimum service period left as per rules can apply offline till 25 June 2026. Find all details about the GBPUAT Dean/Director new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification

age_limit.details: Retirement age is 65 years for Deans and Directors. Candidates must have a minimum of two and a half years of service period left on 25.06.2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate degree in relevant field, 15 years teaching/research/extension experience, At least 5 years as Professor or equivalent, Ability to conduct and guide research
qualification.details: Dean, College of Veterinary & Animal Sciences: Doctorate degree in any branch of Veterinary Sciences or related field with consistently good academic record; At least 15 years teaching/research experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Fisheries: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Fisheries Science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Agribusiness Management: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in Management related discipline/Agriculture or Allied Science; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension/industry experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent or senior position in industry; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Agriculture: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Agril. Science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Community Science: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Home Science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Basic Sciences & Humanities: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Basic Science/Social Science and Humanities with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Technology: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Engineering/Technology or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension/industry experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Dean, College of Post Graduate Studies: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Agriculture Science/Technology/Veterinary Sciences/Basic Sciences & Humanities/Fisheries/Forestry/Home Science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent; Ability to conduct and guide research. Director Research: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Agriculture Science/Technology/Vety. Science/Animal Science/Home Science/Fisheries/Forestry/Biological Science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching and/or research experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or equivalent in an Agricultural University or research institute; Ability to conduct and guide research and administrative experience. Director Extension Education: Ph.D./Doctorate degree in any branch of Agriculture or allied science or related field with consistently good academic record; Fifteen years of teaching/research/extension experience of which at least 5 years as Professor or Equivalent in an agricultural University or Research Institute; Evidence of contribution to Research/Teaching/Extension Education; Experience in planning/Execution/Coordination of Extension Programmes.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Dean, College of Veterinary & Animal Sciences
Dean, College of Basic Sciences & Humanities
Dean, College of Post Graduate Studies

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.gbpuat.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Dean/Director posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GBPUAT Dean/Director posts is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Dean/Director posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies available for the Dean/Director posts in GBPUAT.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Doctorate degree in a relevant field with extensive teaching, research, and extension experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Dean/Director positions?
faq.answer: The retirement age is 65 years, and candidates must have at least two and a half years of service remaining as of 25.06.2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 1500/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the GBPUAT Dean/Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per the 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be found on the official website of GBPUAT, www.gbpuat.ac.in, and links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.answer: The official website of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is www.gbpuat.ac.in.
